items.name: Luanda Open 2023
items.information:
🇦🇴 Bem-vindos à 1ª competição oficial da WCA em Angola!

Sua inscrição só será aprovada no site da WCA após a confirmação do pagamento, que deverá ser efetuado de forma antecipada - mais informações na aba [Inscrever](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/BrasiliaBigsBlind2023/register). Se tiver dificuldades em se inscrever, veja como fazer [neste vídeo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-cJNjPk_J4M).

Favor leia o [Regulamento da WCA](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/portuguese-brazilian) antes da competição.

---

🇺🇸 Welcome to the 1st WCA official competition in Angola!

Your registration will only be approved in the WCA website after payment confirmation, which must be made in advance - more information in the [Register](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/BrasiliaBigsBlind2023/register) tab. If you have any problem with how to register, take a look at [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-cJNjPk_J4M).

Please read the [WCA Regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations) before the competition.
